election2026.muda_candidate: Sharifah Rashifa binti Syed Abdul Rashid Aljunied
election2026.notes_bm: Kerusi tunggal MUDA (penyandang: Presiden Amira Aisya). Pertandingan lima penjuru.
election2026.notes_en: MUDA's sole seat (incumbent: President Amira Aisya). Five-cornered fight.

ballot.name: Sharifah Rashifa binti Syed Abdul Rashid Aljunied

items.item: IKAN KEMBUNG KECIL/PELALING (ANTARA 10 HINGGA 18 EKOR SEKILOGRAM)

premises.premise: MASLEE EXPRES B5 JOHOR STREET MARKET

seat.issue_bm: Banjir kilat asyik melanda Johor Bahru — Mac 2025 lebih 13,000 orang dipindahkan dan daerah JB paling teruk terjejas, kemudian 12 Disember 2025 hujan sejam lebih saja sudah memerangkap 18 bayi di tadika Kampung Mohd Amin, tadika sama yang dinaiki air Disember 2023 — walaupun kerajaan sudah umumkan RM1.45 bilion tebatan banjir Johor dan RM142.7 juta khas untuk hotspot JB.
seat.issue_en: Flash floods keep hitting Johor Bahru — over 13,000 people were evacuated in March 2025 with JB the worst-hit district, then on 12 December 2025 barely an hour of heavy rain trapped 18 babies in a Kampung Mohd Amin kindergarten, the same kampung flooded in December 2023 — despite the government announcing RM1.45 billion for Johor flood mitigation and RM142.7 million specifically for JB hotspots.
seat.receipt_bm: 12 Dis 2025: 18 bayi dan 10 kanak-kanak antara 34 diselamatkan bomba dari tadika dinaiki air di Kampung Mohd Amin, Johor Bahru (FMT). Mac 2025: 11,794 mangsa banjir Johor setakat 21 Mac, daerah JB paling teruk dengan 4,384 (RTM rasmi). Janji sedia ada: RM1.45 bilion tebatan banjir Johor (diumum Sep 2024) + RM142.7 juta untuk 7 projek hotspot JB (Mei 2025) — projek terbesar, PLSB Sungai Skudai RM99.8 juta, masih di peringkat lantikan perunding.
seat.receipt_en: 12 Dec 2025: 18 babies and 10 children among 34 rescued by firefighters from a flooded kindergarten in Kampung Mohd Amin, Johor Bahru (FMT). March 2025: 11,794 Johor flood evacuees as of 21 March, JB the worst-hit district at 4,384 (official RTM). Standing promises: RM1.45 billion for Johor flood mitigation (announced Sept 2024) + RM142.7 million for 7 JB hotspot projects (May 2025) — the biggest, the RM99.8m Sungai Skudai river-basin project, was still at consultant-appointment stage.

seat.issue_bm: Tiga kali dalam setahun air kita terputus — Mei 2025 empat hari tanpa air bila enam pam LRA Sungai Johor rosak, Julai 2025 catuan 26 jam di JB dan Tebrau, dan 21-22 April lepas 23 jam lagi termasuk kawasan Tiram — semuanya bawah konsesi air kerajaan negeri.
seat.issue_en: Three times in twelve months our taps went dry — four days in May 2025 when all six pumps at the Sungai Johor treatment plant failed, a 26-hour cut in July 2025 across JB and Tebrau, and another 23 hours this past 21-22 April covering Tiram — all under the state government's water concession.
seat.receipt_bm: 21-22 April 2026: gangguan air terancang 23 jam oleh Ranhill SAJ (penyelenggaraan LRA Sungai Johor) meliputi kawasan Tiram, Skudai, Bukit Indah, Iskandar Puteri, Kota Tinggi dan Pontian; sebelum itu 20-24 Mei 2025 kira-kira 100,000 akaun terputus bekalan selepas enam pam air mentah LRA Sungai Johor rosak.
seat.receipt_en: 21-22 April 2026: 23-hour scheduled Ranhill SAJ cut (LRA Sungai Johor maintenance) covering Tiram, Skudai, Bukit Indah, Iskandar Puteri, Kota Tinggi and Pontian; before that, 20-24 May 2025, about 100,000 accounts lost supply after all six raw-water pumps at LRA Sungai Johor failed.

seat.issue_bm: Koridor Tebrau sesak kronik — calon PH sendiri, Maszlee, mengaku Kangkar Tebrau dan Kampung Maju Jaya sesak teruk — tetapi RTS hanya beroperasi Januari 2027 di Bukit Chagar, dan sehingga kini masih tiada perkhidmatan pengantara yang disahkan untuk penduduk Ulu Tiram dan Mount Austin.
seat.issue_en: The Tebrau corridor is chronically jammed — PH's own candidate Maszlee admits Kangkar Tebrau and Kampung Maju Jaya are congestion blackspots — yet the RTS only opens in January 2027 at Bukit Chagar, and to this day there is still no confirmed feeder service for Ulu Tiram and Mount Austin residents.
seat.receipt_bm: 30 Jun 2026 (Bernama): Maszlee namakan Kangkar Tebrau & Kampung Maju Jaya sebagai kawasan sesak; 350,000 pengembara guna Tambak Johor setiap hari; MRT Corp sendiri unjurkan RTS (buka Januari 2027 di Bukit Chagar) serap 35% trafik — tetapi setakat 7 Mei 2026 (FMT) pelan pengantara masih kabur, cadangan APM RM7 bilion baru di peringkat surat hasrat.
seat.receipt_en: 30 June 2026 (Bernama): Maszlee named Kangkar Tebrau & Kampung Maju Jaya as congestion blackspots; 350,000 travellers cross the Causeway daily; MRT Corp itself projected the RTS (opening January 2027 at Bukit Chagar) will absorb 35% of traffic — yet as of 7 May 2026 (FMT) the feeder plan was still unclear, with the RM7 billion APM proposal only at letter-of-intent stage.

statewide.issue_bm: Sejak JS-SEZ dimeterai Januari 2025, harga apartmen servis di Johor Bahru melonjak 20.4% dalam setahun — anak muda Puteri Wangsa bergaji ringgit terpaksa bersaing dengan permintaan pelabur rentas sempadan untuk rumah pertama, sampai calon PH sendiri mengaku harga rumah tinggi untuk golongan muda adalah masalah utama di sini.
statewide.issue_en: Since the JS-SEZ was signed in January 2025, Johor Bahru serviced-apartment prices have jumped 20.4% in a single year — young Puteri Wangsa workers earning ringgit are competing with cross-border investor demand for their first home, and even the PH candidate admits high house prices for the young are a top problem here.
statewide.receipt_bm: 17 Julai 2025: FMT lapor data JLL Malaysia — harga apartmen servis Johor Bahru naik 20.4% setahun pada S2 2025 (teres dua tingkat +8.6%), didorong momentum JS-SEZ; 30 Jun 2026: Bernama lapor harga rumah tinggi bagi golongan muda antara isu utama di Puteri Wangsa.
statewide.receipt_en: 17 July 2025: FMT, citing JLL Malaysia — Johor Bahru serviced-apartment prices up 20.4% year-on-year in Q2 2025 (double-storey terraces +8.6%), driven by JS-SEZ momentum; 30 June 2026: Bernama reports high house prices for young people among the top issues in Puteri Wangsa.

statewide.issue_bm: Setahun selepas MB umum pelabur JS-SEZ setuju bayar "gaji premium" RM3,500, calon PH Puteri Wangsa sendiri mengaku remaja kita masih cicir sekolah untuk kerja gig atau kerja kasar di Singapura sebab bayarannya tiga kali ganda — dan dia akui kerajaan negeri sahaja tak mampu selesaikannya.
statewide.issue_en: A year after the MB announced JS-SEZ investors agreed to pay RM3,500 "premium salaries", PH's own Puteri Wangsa candidate admits local teens are still dropping out of school for gig work or manual jobs in Singapore paying triple — and that the state government alone cannot fix it.
statewide.receipt_bm: 30 Jun 2026 (Bernama): Maszlee sebut keciciran pelajaran remaja di Puteri Wangsa dan gaji kerja kasar Singapura "tiga kali ganda"; 20 Mei 2025 (Sinar Harian): Onn Hafiz umum pelabur JS-SEZ setuju gaji minimum RM3,500 (diploma) / RM4,000+ (ijazah), bersyarat produktiviti dan kemahiran.
statewide.receipt_en: 30 June 2026 (Bernama): Maszlee names teen school dropout in Puteri Wangsa and "triple" Singapore manual-job wages; 20 May 2025 (Sinar Harian): Onn Hafiz announced JS-SEZ investors agreed to RM3,500 (diploma) / RM4,000+ (degree) minimum salaries, conditional on productivity and skills.

statewide.issue_bm: Anak muda Muar terpaksa lari ke Singapura sebab gaji di sana tiga kali ganda — 16,930 rakyat Malaysia melepaskan kewarganegaraan pada 2024 sahaja dan lebih 350,000 berulang-alik setiap hari — sedangkan "gaji premium dari RM3,500" yang dijanjikan MB semuanya dalam zon JS-SEZ di selatan Johor, 150km dari Muar.
statewide.issue_en: Muar's young people are forced out to Singapore because pay there is roughly triple — 16,930 Malaysians gave up their citizenship in 2024 alone and over 350,000 commute daily — while the MB's promised "premium salaries from RM3,500" all sit in JS-SEZ zones in southern Johor, 150km from Muar.
statewide.receipt_bm: Jawapan Parlimen KDN, 11 Ogos 2025: 97,318 rakyat Malaysia jadi warga Singapura 2015–Jun 2025, rekod 16,930 pada 2024; lebih 350,000 ulang-alik ke Singapura setiap hari; janji MB "gaji premium dari RM3,500" (Mei 2025) terikat pada 9 zon utama JS-SEZ — kesemuanya di selatan Johor, tiada satu pun di Muar.
statewide.receipt_en: Home Ministry parliamentary reply, 11 Aug 2025: 97,318 Malaysians renounced citizenship for Singapore's between 2015 and June 2025, a record 16,930 in 2024; over 350,000 commute to Singapore daily; the MB's May 2025 "premium salaries from RM3,500" pledge is tied to the nine JS-SEZ flagship zones — all in southern Johor, none in Muar.
